@graph.headline: From Lead Capture to 5-Star Review: Building an Autonomous Workflow That Never Sleeps
@graph.description: Discover how autonomous AI workflows connect every stage of the customer journey — from the first inbound lead to the final 5-star Google review — without a single manual step.

mainEntity.name: What is an autonomous business workflow?

acceptedAnswer.text: An autonomous business workflow is a connected system of AI agents that handles every stage of the customer journey — from the moment a lead comes in to the final 5-star review — without manual intervention.

mainEntity.name: How fast should a small business respond to leads?

acceptedAnswer.text: Research from Harvard Business Review shows that responding within 5 minutes makes you 9 times more likely to convert a lead. Most small businesses take hours or never respond at all.

mainEntity.name: Can AI really automate the entire customer journey?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Modern AI agents can capture leads, send instant responses, book appointments, request reviews, and even reply to those reviews — all autonomously and 24/7.

mainEntity.name: How much does workflow automation cost for a small business?

acceptedAnswer.text: Costs vary by business size and complexity, but the ROI is clear: businesses using AI automation save 10+ hours per week and see 30-40% improvement in lead conversion rates.

@graph.name: Agentic
